message:
Add comprehensive integration test suites for speculative pipeline

Five new integration test files providing end-to-end coverage for the
speculative cancel-correct streaming pipeline:

tests/speculation_adaptive_tests.rs (579 lines):
- Tests for SpeculationWindowController adaptive window sizing
  including grow/shrink actions, fallback activation at high
  correction rates, and posterior belief convergence
- Tests for CorrectionEvidenceLedger including capacity eviction,
  diagnostics computation (correction rate, mean latencies, latency
  savings percentage), window size trend tracking, and JSON export
- Tests for BetaPosterior belief updates and variance reduction
- Tests for CalibrationTracker Brier score accuracy and rolling
  window eviction semantics

tests/speculative_e2e_tests.rs (782 lines):
- End-to-end tests from CLI argument parsing through pipeline
  execution to event output
- CLI flag parsing and clap `requires` constraint validation
- to_speculative_config() builder correctness with custom windows,
  model names, adaptive toggle, always-correct mode, WER tolerance
- Full pipeline construction and execution with mock closures
- Robot event formatting verification for confirm/retract/correct
- Stats and report generation with confirmations_emitted tracking
- Default model name sentinel values (auto-fast, auto-quality)

tests/speculative_pipeline_tests.rs (825 lines):
- Integration tests for SpeculativeStreamingPipeline exercising
  WindowManager + CorrectionTracker integration
- Pipeline construction and fresh-state verification
- Single-window confirm and correct paths with event accumulation
- Multi-window processing with deterministic advancement
- Config impact tests (window size, overlap, tolerance, adaptive)
- Edge cases: empty segments, very high confidence, always_correct
  mode, event suppression with emit_events=false
- Duration-loop processing with bounded final windows
- File processing via process_file_with_models (mocked)

tests/speculative_streaming_pipeline_tests.rs (252 lines):
- Focused tests for SpeculativeStreamingPipeline bd-qlt.6 contract
- process_window confirm path records confirm event and stats
- process_window correct path records retract+correct events
- Robot event required-field validation for all speculation event
  types (partial, confirm, retract, correct, speculation_stats)
- Stats aggregation correctness after multiple windows

tests/tty_correction_tests.rs (494 lines):
- Tests for TTY transcript correction control frames (bd-qlt.16)
- TranscriptSegmentCompact wire format serialization including
  skip_serializing_if for None speaker/confidence fields
- From<&TranscriptionSegment> conversion correctness
- TtyControlFrame::TranscriptPartial serde round-trip
- TtyControlFrame::TranscriptRetract serde round-trip
- emit_tty_transcript_partial NDJSON output verification
- emit_tty_transcript_retract NDJSON output verification
- emit_tty_transcript_correct NDJSON output with CorrectionEvent
- TRANSCRIPT_PROTOCOL_VERSION constant presence test
- Batch emission test for multiple partial segments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
